usage: spaceObject [-help] -fixSide {left right center top bottom middle distHorizontal distVertical} [-honorHalo] [-space <float> [-isSpaceMeanLLtoLL ] ]

options.name: -fixSide
options.description: {left right center top bottom middle distHorizontal distVertical} fixed side for spacing

options.name: -isSpaceMeanLLtoLL
options.description: is the space inputted means distance from objectA's lower left to objectB's lower left? default is false, which means the space is the distance between their bounding box
